design_intent: Eclectic Bohemian living room with layered textiles, warm jewel tones, global patterns, carved wood, and collected vintage character in a relaxed, artful atmosphere.

selected_pieces.product_name: Modern 3-Seater Sofa Premium Boucle Fabric Textured Sofa Couch with Wood Accent Armrests & Rubberwood Legs, Beige - ModernLuxe
selected_pieces.placement_note: Float the sofa centered on the main wall, angled slightly toward the room, with its back left open to define the seating zone and leave space for layered pillows and a patterned throw.

selected_pieces.product_name: Costway Rattan Coffee Table Mid Century Modern Center Table with 2 Storage Drawers
selected_pieces.placement_note: Place the coffee table directly in front of the sofa, centered on a faded rug, leaving about 16–18 inches of circulation space around it for a relaxed conversation layout.

selected_pieces.product_name: VINGLI TV Stands & Entertainment Centers For Tvs Up To 70'' Farmhouse with 18'' Fireplace
selected_pieces.placement_note: Position the media console against the opposite wall as a low visual counterbalance, with art and layered decor styled above it and the fireplace glow acting as a warm focal point.

selected_pieces.product_name: 5'x7' Washable Fringed Medallion Area Rug Rust - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Anchor the entire seating group with the rug beneath the front legs of the sofa and coffee table so the rust medallion pattern reads as the room’s textile foundation.

selected_pieces.product_name: Oversized Blocked Woven Square Throw Pillow Neutral - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Layer two pillows near the outer corners of the sofa, mixing them with more colorful textiles so the woven texture softens the seating silhouette.

selected_pieces.product_name: Stone Washed and Distressed Cotton Decor Throw Pillow Cover And Pillow Insert Set - Becky Cameron, Stone Washed Olive, 20 x 20
selected_pieces.placement_note: Tuck this olive pillow slightly in front of the neutral woven pillow to introduce depth and a muted jewel-tone accent within the sofa grouping.
Place one floral pillow at a sofa corner or on an accent chair to add the most visibly global, collected layer of pattern and color.

selected_pieces.product_name: Pottery Arch Handle Planter for Home Decor - Decorative Flower Pot for Living Room Decor, Shelf Accent, and Patio - Indoor and Outdoor - 8", White
selected_pieces.placement_note: Set the planter on the media console or a side table near one end of the room, using a tall leafy plant to add height and a lived-in bohemian softness.
